pages.text: $(alien)Gravion Disk$(): Can store immense kinetic shockwaves.

Forged in the $(l:patchouli:machines/primal_catalyst)Primal Catalyst$() via:$(br2)• 2x $(l:patchouli:materials/graviton)Graviton$()$(br2)• 1x $(l:patchouli:materials/neutrion)Neutrion Ingot$()$(br2)$(4)CRITICAL$() - This alloy enables the $(l:patchouli:machines/pyramid_core)Pyramid Core$() to produce entropy $(4)CONTINUOUSLY$() when placed in its fuel slot!
